title: Mid-Level Radiologist at Lupin Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Radiologist at Lupin Asia Pacific Associates
jsonLd.description:
We at Lupin Asia Pacific Associates are looking for an experienced Radiologist based out of Chennai. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Lupin Asia Pacific Associates:
Lupin Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lupin Asia Pacific Associates!
